## 13. 推荐工作流

### 13.1 新项目接入

```bash
# 安装并配置 Agent
npx @colbymchenry/codegraph

# 重启 Agent

# 进入项目
cd your-project

# 初始化并索引
codegraph init -i

# 检查状态
codegraph status
```

### 13.2 日常开发

```bash
# 切换分支后同步
codegraph sync

# 查找符号
codegraph query UserService

# 理解功能
codegraph context "how does authentication work"

# 改动前看影响范围
codegraph impact AuthMiddleware --depth 3
```

### 13.3 重构前

```bash
# 先找符号
codegraph query AuthMiddleware

# 看上游调用方
codegraph callers AuthMiddleware

# 看下游依赖
codegraph callees AuthMiddleware

# 看影响范围
codegraph impact AuthMiddleware --depth 3
```

### 13.4 CI 只跑受影响测试

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash

AFFECTED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD | codegraph affected --stdin --quiet)

if [ -n "$AFFECTED" ]; then
  npx vitest run $AFFECTED
fi
```
